JIWOOGAE Heartleaf BHA Peeling Pad

70 pads · All skin types · Acne-prone
★★★★★ 3,495 verified reviews on YesStyle

The brand's iconic bestseller. Dual-textured peeling pads with BHA and heartleaf extract that exfoliate, soothe and brighten in one effortless step.

$27.99

The brand's iconic bestseller. Dual-textured peeling pads with BHA and heartleaf extract that exfoliate, soothe and brighten in one effortless step.

Key Actives:

Betaine Salicylate (BHA)Heartleaf ExtractMadecassosideTea Tree Oil
Free from: parabens · artificial colorants · synthetic fragrances · harsh chemicals

Swipe the textured side over cleansed skin. No rinse needed. Follow with toner and serum.
